overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic city. The player moves from under an overpass through a busy intersection, past the 'Time Machine' nightclub, and along sidewalks lined with holographic advertisements and food vendors.

events.description: pedestrian in green shirt passes very close to camera on the right, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing by a yellow bus and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt walking toward camera, passing by closely at 12 seconds

entered.detail: concrete elevated highway structure overhead creating partial cover
distinctive yellow public transit bus with digital route display showing 80
large digital advertisement screens on building facades displaying colorful neon graphics
purple neon lighting along the bus and street level shops

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive concrete overpass in a cyberpunk city at night. A yellow bus is parked on the left with purple neon lights illuminating the street level. Holographic billboards glow in the distance while pedestrians walk toward the camera.

events.description: ego begins crossing the wide intersection, following a pedestrian in a black coat
futuristic cars drive through the intersection, waiting for pedestrians to clear

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection alongside another pedestrian, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in long black coat walking ahead of ego, leading the way across the intersection

entered.detail: art deco style building with warm neon trim and illuminated TIME MACHINE signage
yellow painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
suspended traffic signals showing red for vehicles

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into a wide neon-lit intersection. The Time Machine club glows on the right with art deco styling. The camera follows a pedestrian across the yellow-striped crosswalk as futuristic cars wait at the traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza looking up at skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to look at the Delamain sign and upper floors of buildings, then tilts back down

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the towering architecture and neon signs overhead, then continuing forward

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate sign for Delamain visible high on building facade
raised roadway structure with yellow trim connecting buildings overhead
clear night sky visible between towering skyscrapers when looking up

segments.scene_description: Standing at the corner near The Time Machine club, the camera tilts up to reveal the Delamain corporate sign and elevated highways connecting the mega-structures. The sky is visible between the towers, showing the full vertical scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with food vendors and steam vents

events.description: moving from open intersection into narrower sidewalk corridor lined with food stands

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past food vendors and steam vents, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: small street food kiosk with green roof and yellow base, displaying menu items
white steam or smoke rising from street vents, creating atmospheric effect

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the sidewalk past a green-roofed food vendor stand. Steam rises from street vents in the center of the road. The Time Machine club is now behind as the camera moves deeper into the neon-lit street lined with holographic advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadowed depths of a concrete overpass into the sprawling, vertical neon expanse of a futuristic city. It begins beneath a massive overpass where purple neon lights from a parked yellow bus illuminate the street and holographic billboards glow in the distance. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a wide, neon-lit intersection where the art deco styling of The Time Machine club appears on the right and futuristic cars wait at a yellow-striped crosswalk. The perspective then tilts upward from the street corner to reveal the towering Delamain corporate sign and elevated highways that connect the massive skyscrapers against the night sky. Finally, the camera moves forward past a green-roofed food vendor and rising street steam, leaving the club behind to venture deeper into a street lined with vibrant holographic advertisements.
